brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index sinks to 31, mirroring the extreme anxiety that marked the August 2024 bottom. Stablecoin growth is quietly accelerating on the sidelines, a historically reliable signal that smart money is loading up for a reversal while momentum traders capitulate. The echoes of last summer's false breakdown are growing louder, suggesting this sideways consolidation is a re-accumulation phase rather than distribution.
brain_consensus.headline: Dry Powder Builds as Fear Grips the Range

next_move.reasoning: Score sits at 31 (Fear/Greed anchor), squarely in Anxiety band (39-46) is wrong—recalculating: Fear/Greed 31 maps to Panic band (24-31), but funding 50, btc_dom_fade 50, stablecoin 51 cluster in Complacency (47-54); the composite score across all factors lands near 51, putting us in Complacency band with Anxiety as ±1 legal call. Given 0% direction accuracy and 0% transition accuracy over 18 calls, with recent autopsies showing 'predicted UP/DOWN, got HOLD' repeatedly, the 0-of-35 coil statistic is decisive: no 12h window broke ±2 points in 7 days. The massive ETF flows divergence (+45) and VIX spike (+28) vs MVRV collapse (-16) create cross-currents that cancel. No breaker visible.
next_move.confirmed_if: Fear/Greed breaks below 24 (Panic threshold) with funding dropping below 35 and VIX spiking above 75

narrative.headline: Dry Powder Builds as Fear Grips the Range
